posts.title: Why Every Company and Person Should Use a Password Manager
posts.excerpt: Passwords are the weakest link in digital security - and also the easiest one to fix.

posts.title: File Integrity Monitoring: The Silent Guardian of Your Systems
posts.excerpt: Attackers leave traces. File Integrity Monitoring catches them. By monitoring critical files and configurations, FIM detects the subtle changes that signal a compromise-modified binaries, altered configs, unauthorized scripts. Discover how this security control transforms from reactive forensics to proactive defense.
